productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Grey Casual Shoes
description: These flying machine shoes are inspired by a retro-esque fusion of fashion with contemporary styles. Iconic and synonymous with style in the youth culture, these shoes reflect a fusion of sport and style. Sleek silhouetting on this canvas shoe make this an off-duty essential. Cut a dash to all off-duty dos with these throwback classic canvas shoes. Wear this with form fitting denims, a monochrome tee and a casual jacket.Upperdenim upper for style, easy maintenance and durabilityCentral lacing for a snug FitPU toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug fitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durabilityMidsolePU midsole for impact protectionOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionBrick and herringbone patterned grooves on the outsoleSlipper careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
